ddls:
CREATE TABLE "qualifiers" (
  "qualifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualifier */,
  "qualifier_name" TEXT /* Name of the qualifier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the qualifier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the qualifier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the qualifier was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the qualifier */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the qualifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the method */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the method is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the source */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the source is currently active or deprecated */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., external, internal, physical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the sample */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the sample */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the sample is currently active or deprecated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the source from which the sample was derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derived_from" (
  "derived_from_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each derived from group */,
  "derived_from_name" TEXT /* Name of the derived from group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the derived from group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the derived from group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the derived from group was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the derived from group */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the derived from group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the derived from group is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derived_from_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "qualifier_id" INTEGER /* Qualifier for the data value */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Method used to generate the data value */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source of the data value */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Sample associated with the data value */,
  "derived_from_id" INTEGER /* Derived from group for the data value */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Actual data value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data value was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the data value */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the data value */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data value is currently active or deprecated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_derived_from_id FOREIGN KEY ("derived_from_id") REFERENCES derived_from ("derived_from_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_qualifier_id FOREIGN KEY ("qualifier_id") REFERENCES qualifiers ("qualifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_lineage" (
  "lineage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineage entry */,
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Data value ID for the current data value */,
  "parent_data_value_id" INTEGER /* Parent data value ID for the current data value */,
  "transformation" TEXT /* Transformation applied to the parent data value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lineage entry was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the lineage entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the lineage entry is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_data_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_value_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_lineage_parent_data_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_data_value_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data owner, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the admin who created the user account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the admin who last updated the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is currently active or deprecated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Data value ID for the data value */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID for the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission for the user (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access control entry was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the admin who created the access control entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access control entry is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_data_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_value_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Data value ID for the data value */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID for the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the data value (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail entry was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the admin who created the audit trail entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the audit trail entry is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_data_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_value_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Data value ID for the data value */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number for the data value */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the data version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data version is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_value_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_history" (
  "data_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data history entry */,
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Data value ID for the data value */,
  "previous_data_value" INTEGER /* Previous data value ID for the data value */,
  "next_data_value" INTEGER /* Next data value ID for the data value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data history entry was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the data history entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data history entry is currently active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_next_data_value FOREIGN KEY ("next_data_value") REFERENCES data_values ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_previous_data_value FOREIGN KEY ("previous_data_value") REFERENCES data_values ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_history_data_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_value_id") REFERENCES data_values ("data_value_id")
)
